steps.title: Rewrite line s
steps.content: Put line $s$ in slope-intercept form: $y+13=5x$, so $y=5x-13$. The slope of line $s$ is $5$.

steps.title: Use parallel slopes
steps.content: Parallel lines have the same slope. Since line $t$ is parallel to line $s$, line $t$ also has slope $5$. The answer is C.
